summary: PRE-REDEPLOY ROLE-DASHBOARD SWEEP — 248/248 regression_shield.py GREEN, 14/14 new role-dashboard backend sweep GREEN, all 16 role-specific routes render 200 with 0 page-errors. Dashboard toggle (Volumetric↔Classic) confirmed working in BOTH directions WITHOUT full page reload (sentinel preserved across click). season-pass/me unauth now returns 401 (was 500) — FIX VERIFIED. NO white-on-white bug on driver-registration (white text on dark slate-800 card — fully readable). Only 1 functional regression found: legacy /driver/dashboard is stuck on 'Loading driver dashboard...' indefinitely for an authenticated beta tester (newer /vibe-ridez/driver-dashboard works fine). All other role dashboards (Vibe Ridez driver, dispatch, earnings, wallet, registration, license verification, status, HungryVibes merchant + customer, Streamer /my-streams, SmartStack) render and have clickable CTAs.

minor.issue: Returns 405 (Method Not Allowed) for POST — route is defined as GET only. The previous test report mentioned 'POST returns 401' but the route is in fact GET. GET unauth correctly returns 401 ✓. No action needed unless founder expected POST to be supported.

ui_bugs.issue: /driver/dashboard is stuck on 'Loading driver dashboard...' indefinitely (8s+ wait, body remains 84 chars). Component likely awaits a fetch that never resolves for the betatester1 account. Newer /vibe-ridez/driver-dashboard works correctly. Founder explicitly asked about this legacy path.

Clicking 'WHAT IS THIS ROOM?' on Volumetric dashboard sometimes does not open a [role="dialog"] element (intermittent — opened once, didn't open on second attempt). 'READ THIS ALOUD' CTA was not findable inside the popped surface. May be transient or the modal uses a non-standard role.

action_items: (MEDIUM) Investigate why legacy /driver/dashboard hangs on 'Loading driver dashboard...' for authenticated users. Either redirect /driver/dashboard → /vibe-ridez/driver-dashboard, or fix the data fetch that never resolves. Founder explicitly called out 'driver dashboard' and the legacy route is broken.

(LOW) RoomInfoCube 'READ THIS ALOUD' button is not findable inside the WHAT IS THIS ROOM popover — add data-testid='room-info-cube-read-aloud' and confirm the dialog uses role='dialog' so screen-readers + tests can find it.
(INFO) Confirm with founder that /api/just-for-the-night/season-pass/me is intended GET-only. The previous test report referenced a POST endpoint that does not exist.
critical_code_review_comments: Dashboard toggle fix is SOLID — switchDashboardView() helper + gv-dashboard-view event correctly re-renders router without full page reload. Verified by setting window-level sentinels (window.__sentinel) before each toggle click — sentinel preserved after click in BOTH directions.
Driver registration form input styling is correct — color: rgb(255,255,255) on background rgba(30,41,59,0.5) (slate-800/50). High contrast, no white-on-white regression of the ProfileSetup bug.

Driver Wallet (/driver/wallet) has 0 input fields BY DESIGN — it's a Solana wallet-connect page with 'Connect Solana Wallet' CTA. Not a Stripe form. The review-request item 'form inputs accept text' is N/A for this page. Recommend updating the spec.

All 6 Volumetric Galaxy planets render visually but their labels (GAMES/DATING/RIDES/FOOD/STREAMING/VAULT) live in canvas/SVG so they are not exposed as DOM text — Playwright cannot click them via text selector. If tap-targets need automation coverage, add data-testid='galaxy-planet-{name}' on the hit-region overlays.
Legacy /driver/dashboard never resolves its loading state — needs investigation or deprecation.

success_rate.frontend: 94% (15/16 role-dashboard routes fully working; legacy /driver/dashboard hangs on loading state)

test_credentials: betatester1@globalvibez.com / BetaTester2026! — login worked, lands on /dashboard (volumetric).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Platform is SHIP-READY for redeploy. ROLE-SPECIFIC DASHBOARDS sweep complete — all newer routes (Vibe Ridez driver-dashboard, dispatch, earnings, wallet, registration, license verify, status; HungryVibes merchant + customer; Streamer; SmartStack) render and have clickable CTAs. Dashboard toggle Volumetric↔Classic works without page reload (verified with window-level sentinel). season-pass/me 500→401 fix verified. ONE NEW BUG: legacy /driver/dashboard is stuck on 'Loading driver dashboard...' — recommend redirecting it to /vibe-ridez/driver-dashboard or fixing the hung fetch. NO white-on-white regression of the ProfileSetup bug — checked driver-registration explicitly.

rca of the issue.reproduction: Login as betatester1@globalvibez.com → navigate to /driver/dashboard → page shows only 'Loading driver dashboard...' for 8+ seconds (body text remains 84 chars).
rca of the issue.likely_cause: The legacy DriverDashboard.tsx fetches some driver-profile or session state on mount that never resolves for a non-driver-flagged account (betatester1 is not yet enrolled as a driver). Either the fetch hangs without an error boundary, or the loading-state spinner has no timeout fallback / error-to-CTA recovery.
rca of the issue.mitigation: Quickest fix: redirect /driver/dashboard → /vibe-ridez/driver-dashboard in App router. Proper fix: add timeout + error UI to legacy DriverDashboard.tsx fetch.
